zh.lifeSummary: 當Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain於大約1187年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯時，他的父親Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond23歲，母親Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy30歲。他和Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen"至少有4個兒子。他去世於1258年在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾比阿拉可盧加享年72歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾可爾可姆洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain于大约1187年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯时，他的父亲Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond23岁，母亲Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy30岁。他和Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen"至少有4个儿子。他去世于1258年在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾比阿拉可盧加享年72岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾可爾可姆洛。

nameMeanings.name: O
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

nameMeanings.name: Briain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Brittain  .

variants.name: Brittain
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Bretagne, Bretaign(e) ‘Brittany’. Some of the modern forms are from the Middle English Brytane, Brittan ‘Breton’; compare Breton .

nameMeanings.name: Conchobhar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, probably meaning ‘lover of hounds’; borne by a legendary king of Ulster who lived at the time of Christ.

variants.name: Connor
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Conchobhar . In recent years the name has also become very popular outside Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: an
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain was born about 1187, in Ennis, County Clare, Ireland, his father, Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond, was 23 and his mother, Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy, was 30. He had at least 4 sons with Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen". He died in 1258, in Bealaclugga, County Clare, Ireland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Corcomroe, County Clare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain est né environ 1187, à Ennis, County Clare, Irlande, son père, Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen". Il est décédé en 1258, à Bealaclugga, County Clare, Irlande, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Corcomroe, County Clare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain um 1187 in Ennis, County Clare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond 23 und seine Mutter Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy 30. Er hatte mit Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen" mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1258 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Bealaclugga, County Clare, Irland und wurde in Corcomroe, County Clare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain è nato il circa 1187 nel Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, il suo padre, Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen". Morì nel 1258, nel Bealaclugga, County Clare, Irlanda, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Corcomroe, County Clare, Irlanda.

ja.Ennis, Clare, Munster, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ クラーエニス
ja.Munster, Ireland: アイルランドムンスター
ja.Corcomroe Abbey, Corcomroe, County Clare: アイルランドコウントイ クラーコルコムロー
ja.Killaloe, Clare, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ クラーキラロ
ja.lifeSummary: Conchobhar an Suidane O Briainが約1187年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスで生まれた時，父Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomondは23歳，母Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedyは30歳であった。彼はMór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen"との間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1258年にアイルランドコウントイ クラービーラクルグガで72歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ クラーコルコムローにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain(이)가 대략 1187년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen"(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1258년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 빌라클루가에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 코르코로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain nasceu aproximadamente 1187, em Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, seu pai, Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen". Ele faleceu em 1258, em Bealaclugga, County Clare, Irlanda, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Corcomroe, County Clare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain родился около 1187 г. в местности эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy, 30. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen". Он умер в 1258 г. в местности билаклуга, коунти клар, Ирландия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности коркомро, коунти клар, Ирландия.

sm.from 1242 to 1258: mai le 1242 e o'o I le 1258

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Conchobhar an Suidane O Briain nació aproximadamente 1187, en Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, su papá, Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Mór macNamara Uí Collieann "Cullen". Murió en 1258, en Bealaclugga, County Clare, Irlanda, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Corcomroe, County Clare, Irlanda.
